choices.text: Ablative (AVCOAT/PICA-X) vaporizes carrying heat away — single-use, robust, deep-space (Apollo, Dragon, Stardust). Reusable (Shuttle HRSI tiles, Starship steel) reusable but fragile and limited regime. Choose by reentry energy + reusability needs.

Foam strike during launch damaged RCC leading-edge of wing. Hot plasma during reentry entered wing through hole; destroyed structure. 7 astronauts killed (2003). Lesson: inspection critical even for non-critical-seeming launch damage.

questions.explanation: Foam strike → wing breach → reentry loss.
